excerpts.excerpt_text: In House v The King the appellant appealed and the matter was heard by the High Court.
The plaintiff claimed the privative clause denied review, and the Commonwealth denied that challenge before the High Court.
The High Court ruled on the challenge and ordered the matter to proceed.
